title: Minecraft Create & Guns Adventure
description:
This well-optimized modpack will provide minecraft with a new feeling. It has mods as small as a simple search bar for your keybinds, to the giant Create mod! 

This was designed to work with a specific server. The IP is pre-installed for you.
body:
FORGE VERSION: 47.3.0
MINECRAFT VERSION: 1.20.1



**This project has been scrapped and will no longer receive updates.** _Sorry_

This modpack adds in several cool mods! From mods as small as a search bar for your keybinds section. To entire Guns added to the game! This modpack has it all!


_This modpack adds..._
**Better Weather! Guns! Optimizations! Create mods & addons!**

**(Scroll down to see the FULL modlist)**
